new_feature_requests.summary: Complete the phlebotomist-to-hospital assignment backend logic: ensure the assignPhlebotomistToHospital and removePhlebotomistFromHospital functions correctly update the phlebotomist-hospital assignments map, validate that the phlebotomist exists and has the correct role, and persist changes across upgrades.

Complete area-matching logic: when a phlebotomist logs in or is assigned, match them to hospitals in the same city/area field. Expose a backend query that returns hospitals assigned to the calling phlebotomist filtered by their area, so the AddHospitalSamplePage and HomeCollectionQueuePage only show relevant hospitals.

Validate the hospital management flow end-to-end: the HospitalManagementPage must correctly reflect add, edit, and disable operations using the updated backend functions, with proper optimistic UI updates and error toasts.

Ensure the HospitalDetailsPage phlebotomist assignment UI (assign/remove actions and search panel) is correctly wired to the backend assignment functions, with confirmation dialogs and success/error toasts reflecting the actual backend response.

projectName: Continue phlebotomist assignment and area-matching backend logic
